title: v0.3 UI 改造：任务日历计划板
behavior: 按 docs/design/page/pages/calendar-page.md 重做任务日历页信息层级，把日历页定位为目标计划板：展示当前目标、整体进度、时间压力、近 7 天任务和远期阶段。

acceptance.text: 任务日历页展示当前目标计划卡、当前目标整体进度、时间压力信息和调整计划入口
近 7 天展示具体 Task；DDL 超过 7 天时展示远期 Stage 阶段安排，不一次性展开大量远期 Task
点击或选择某一天后能看到当天任务列表；默认视图仍保持最近 7 天可扫读
AI 计划建议保持短句，不出现长篇计划解读；进度表示当前目标整体进度，不是单个任务进度
日历页继续通过 Goal/Plan/Stage/Task 视图服务读取数据，不在页面层直接拼装底层存储结构

verify.feature: npm run test -- plan-calendar ui-components data-layer

outOfScope: 不改变 PlanBundle 持久化结构
不改变 replanner 顺延策略

userPath: DDL 7 天内 -> 打开日历页 -> 全部展示为近 7 天具体任务
DDL 超过 7 天 -> 打开日历页 -> 同时看到近 7 天任务和远期阶段
无计划数据 -> 打开日历页 -> 显示明确空状态和创建目标入口
integrationEvidence: tests/plan-calendar.test.ts 覆盖 PlanBundle calendar view、近 7 天任务、远期 Stage 和 progress
tests/data-layer.test.ts 保持旧数据迁移与新 PlanBundle 主路径通过
npm.cmd run verify:system 通过，mp-weixin 构建产物生成成功
人工冒烟需检查日历页首屏是否能区分目标进度、任务列表和远期阶段

commands.command: npm.cmd run test -- plan-calendar ui-components data-layer
commands.notes: 25 tests passed across plan-calendar, ui-components, and data-layer; coverage includes PlanBundle calendar view, near 7 day task limit, far Stage summaries, overall progress, time pressure, page source structure, and storage-to-view path.
mp-weixin build completed successfully; Sass legacy API warnings only.
Harness gate passed first with F22 active (4 features: 2 passing, 1 active, 1 not_started) and then after F22 was marked passing (4 features: 3 passing, 1 not_started), with 0 warnings and 0 errors.

evidence.manualSmoke: Source/build smoke for F22: calendar page first renders the current goal plan card; progress card shows whole-plan progress and time pressure; near 7 day board is scanable and uses selectable date chips; selecting a date reveals that day TaskCard list; far Stage rows are summarized separately without expanding future tasks; AI plan advice is limited to short tips; adjust plan entry is present and routes to the existing review path; page reads through migrateLegacyDailyPlans() and buildPlanBundleCalendarView().
evidence.notes: F22 extends the plan-view selector with PlanTimePressure and short planAdvice fields. It does not change PlanBundle persistence, storage keys, planner output, replanner strategy, Task.status writeback, AI services, or tarot behavior.
